insight: Iso Kronus in a Breachproof context creates a narrow scenario where buying a second copy of a large absorber could be correct: if the opponent is Breachproof and has exactly enough Cryo Rays to kill the absorbers off-turn after each fires, rebuy becomes viable to maintain continuous absorb coverage.
author: .bky_1556
context: bky describing a very specific edge case where buying a second absorber unit is correct against Iso Kronus Breachproof with exactly 5 Cryo Rays remaining.
